title: Sports minister: Iran can't compete at World Cup
summary: Iran cannot participate in the 2026 World Cup following recent airstrikes against the country by the US and Israel, according to the Iranian sports minister. This declaration impacts the tournament's group stage planning and represents a significant geopolitical consequence of regional tensions.
content: Iran cannot participate in the 2026 World Cup following airstrikes against the country by the United States and Israel, the Iranian sports minister said Wednesday.
